Class ManagerTheme

java.lang.Object
com.project.view.manager.ManagerTheme
public final class ManagerTheme extends Object
Utility class providing consistent styling and theming for manager interface components. Defines color constants, CSS style strings, and helper methods for UI consistency.

  • Method Details

    • stylePageTitle

      public static void stylePageTitle(javafx.scene.control.Label label)
      Applies page title styling to a label. Sets large font size and light text color.
      Parameters:
      label - the label to style

    • styleHeaderSubtitle

      public static void styleHeaderSubtitle(javafx.scene.control.Label label)
      Applies header subtitle styling to a label. Sets medium font size and dark text color.
      Parameters:
      label - the label to style

    • styleSectionTitle

      public static void styleSectionTitle(javafx.scene.control.Label label)
      Applies section title styling to a label. Sets medium-large font size and dark text color.
      Parameters:
      label - the label to style

    • styleCaption

      public static void styleCaption(javafx.scene.control.Label label)
      Applies caption styling to a label. Sets small font size and medium-dark text color.
      Parameters:
      label - the label to style

    • stylePrimaryButton

      public static void stylePrimaryButton(javafx.scene.control.Button button)
      Applies primary button styling to a button. Uses the PRIMARY_BUTTON style constant.
      Parameters:
      button - the button to style

    • styleSecondaryButton

      public static void styleSecondaryButton(javafx.scene.control.Button button)
      Applies secondary button styling to a button. Uses the SECONDARY_BUTTON style constant.
      Parameters:
      button - the button to style

    • styleTabButton

      public static void styleTabButton(javafx.scene.control.Button button, boolean active)
      Applies tab button styling to a button based on active state. Uses different background colors for active and inactive states.
      Parameters:
      button - the button to style
      active - whether the button represents the active tab

    • styleCard

      public static void styleCard(javafx.scene.layout.Region region)
      Applies card styling to a region. Uses the PANEL_CARD style constant for bordered background.
      Parameters:
      region - the region to style

    • createHeaderBar

      public static javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane createHeaderBar(String pageName)
      Creates the standard orange header bar matching the cashier format.
